050\111\113\087\102\101\097\078\084\088\043\112\050\082\075\061\061","\100\107\043\102\099\075\061\061";"\078\081\048\098","\088\119\109\061","\121\049\110\101\103\081\075\122\109\111\061\061"}local function P(P)return y[P+(-901857+913763)]end for P,M in ipairs({{779345-779344,-560792+561330},{-320993+320994,760412-759918},{-818316+818811,108630-108092}})do while M[-771909-(-771910)]<M[411884+-411882]do y[M[-335719+335720]],y[M[-273617-(-273619)]],M[107369-107368],M[-321108-(-321110)]=y[M[-627234-(-627236)]],y[M[1010485+-1010484]],M[783878+-783877]+(-647503-(-647504)),M[-424794-(-424796)]-(-648057-(-648058))end end do local P=y local M=type local
